name: Mexican Beans & Rice
recipeIngredient: 100 g pinto or red kidney beans (cooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a non-stick frying pan over medium heat and cook the onion until soft, about 5 minutes.
2. Add the green chili and rice to the pan; stir and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the rice becomes translucent.
3. Chop the tomatoes and add them to the mixture with the rice. Pour in the vegetable stock, bring to a boil, then cover and simmer on low heat for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in the cooked beans and black pepper; if needed, add extra water to achieve desired consistency. Continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and serve.
